title: Electronic device and location-based information service method therewith
abstract: An electronic device and user situation-adaptive location-based information service method therewith is provided. The location-based information service method of the present disclosure includes receiving, at the electronic device, an information service request; checking, upon receipt of the information service request, location information; retrieving first information associated with the location information; and determining a situation of a user of the electronic device in association with the location information based on the first information.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A location-based information service method of an electronic device, the method comprising: receiving, at the electronic device, an information service request; checking, upon receipt of the information service request, location information; retrieving first information associated with the location information; and determining a situation of a user of the electronic device in association with the location information based on the first information. The method of claim 1, further comprising: generating second information based on the user situation; and providing the user with the second information. The method of claim 2, further comprising: receiving a user feedback about the second information; analyzing the received user feedback; and storing analysis results. The method of claim 1, wherein the first information is generated and stored by the electronic device or acquired using an external search engine, wherein determining the situation of the user comprises determining a correlation between the first information and the location information. The method of claim 2, wherein providing the user with the second information comprises: generating a screen with the second information; and displaying the screen on a display. The method of claim 2, wherein the second information is generated and/or stored by the electronic device. The method of claim 2, wherein the second information is acquired using an external search engine. The method of claim 2, wherein generating the second information comprises acquiring the second information in association with the location based on the user situation. An electronic device comprising: a memory; an input device comprising input circuitry; a display; a communication module comprising communication circuitry; and a processor configured to control the communication module to receive an information service request, to check location information upon receipt of the information service request, to retrieve first information associated with the location information, and to determine a situation of a user of the electronic device in association with the location information based on the first information. The electronic device of claim 9, wherein the processor is configured to generate second information based on the user situation and to provide the second information on the display. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to receive feedback about the second information,  wherein the input device is configured to receive an input indicative of the feedback, the processor being further configured to analyze the received feedback, and to store analysis results in the memory. The electronic device of claim 9, wherein the electronic device is configured to generate and/or store the first information or acquire the first information using an external search engine, wherein the processor is configured to determine a correlation between the first information and the location information, wherein the processor is configured to acquire the second information in association with the location based on the user situation. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the processor is configured to generate a screen including the second information and to control the display to display the screen. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the electronic device is configured to generate and/or store the second information. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the electronic device is configured to acquire the second information using an external search engine.
